PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-17-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lawrence Siracusa for Robin Gimore (Petitioner).

Counsel informed the Court that Mr. Edwards (the dad) has waived priority to serve. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order). Bond in the amount of $90,000.00 is required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Whitehead.
